sourceRef.citation: Wikipedia: List of unsolved problems (group theory)

statement.en: Herzog-Schönheim conjecture: If a group G has an exact covering {g_1 H_1, ..., g_k H_k} (k > 1) by cosets of subgroups H_i, then the indices [G:H_1], ..., [G:H_k] cannot be pairwise distinct.
statement.ja: Herzog-Schönheim 予想: 群 G が subgroups H_i の coset による exact covering {g_1 H_1, ..., g_k H_k} (k > 1) を持つなら、指数 [G:H_i] は互いに異なれない
statement.latex: \text{If } G = \bigsqcup_{i=1}^{k} g_i H_i \ (k > 1), \text{ then } [G:H_i] \text{ cannot all be distinct}

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: ∀ G ∀ covering Π₂ 普遍命題. Abelian case は証明済 (Mirsky-Newman) で分野橋渡し (群論 × 数論)
reiTyping.rationale: 型=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE (任意群 G の covering), 副=VI_BRIDGING (group × covering × number theory), D-FUMT₈=NEITHER; 形式化=scaffold (実 sorry=4 in 274.lean)

external: Mirsky-Newman (abelian case proof via covering system of ℤ)

formalization.notes: Namespaces: Erdos274. 実 file は 87 行: Group.ExactCovering 構造体定義 + erdos_274 main (2 sorry: answer+body) + erdos_274.variants.abelian (1 sorry, Mirsky-Newman 系の既知結果) + herzog_schonheim (1 sorry, main conjecture) = 合計 4 sorry

known_progress.impact: 対応する covering system (Erdős の数論 covering 問題) と等価視点の登場

known_progress.event: Mirsky-Newman theorem: abelian/cyclic case で指数重複を証明
known_progress.impact: 有限 abelian group case 解決済 (→ ErdosProblems/274.lean の abelian variant)
solvable group の一部 case で進展

reiAssessment.approachSuggestion: (1) Mirsky-Newman abelian case を Lean 4 で再構築 → erdos_274.variants.abelian sorry 閉鎖. (2) 既知 solvable case の部分証明を参照. (3) 一般の non-solvable case は world-open, 藤本さん判断事項
reiAssessment.solveRationale: Familiar=False, primaryType=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE + VI_BRIDGING, dfumt8=NEITHER, formalization=scaffold (4 sorry). abelian case は Lean 4 移植 tractable
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: abelian case の Mirsky-Newman 証明は典型的 Mathlib 射程内. 一般 case は 50 年 open
reiAssessment.famousHardCap: Herzog-Schönheim 本体は世界的 open, 完全解決は藤本さん判断事項
